positiveClaims: DOCX review preview session activation is exposed as a separate review-bridge command surface: cmd.project.review.activateDocxReviewPreviewSession.
The command accepts only pathless requestId and bufferSource input from the renderer.
DOCX comments from word/comments.xml become bounded Review Packet commentThreads.
Unambiguous document commentRangeStart/commentRangeEnd anchors become manual commentPlacements with policy manual.
The command activates an in-memory Review session through the existing Stage01 review preview path.
Successful activation opens Review/Comments through the existing canonical runtime command path.
Tracked changes are kept diagnostic-only and never become textChanges or apply operations.
Clean DOCX, malformed input, unsafe input, and tracked-changes-only DOCX do not activate a session.
The implementation uses existing bounded ZIP, XML-scan, Stage01, and Review mutate-port primitives and adds no dependency.
nonClaims: No full DOCX review import is claimed.
No DOCX tracked-change apply is claimed.
No exact apply is authorized by this contour.
No structural apply is authorized by this contour.
No project truth write is performed.
No receipt or recovery evidence is created by activation.
No DOCX import safe-create flow is changed or widened.
No import/export MVP closeout is widened.
No Word layout parity or full DOCX fidelity is claimed.
No PDF, EPUB, HTML, Mindmap, release readiness, cross-platform readiness, cloud, sync, accounts, or Y9 admission is claimed.
layerDecisions: DOCX remains external evidence transport, not project truth.
Preflight remains diagnostic-only and is not promoted by mutation.
Activation is a separate command and builder layer after preflight.
Renderer authority remains limited to requestId and bufferSource.
Main owns current project, current file, targetScope, baselineHash, currentBaselineHash, sessionId, and Review session activation.
Review Packet activation goes through existing Stage01 preview surface and keeps blockedApplyPlan.canApply=false with applyOps=[].
Tracked changes are diagnosticItems only and do not enter reviewPacket.textChanges.
Comment placements are manual anchors, not exact-text apply authorization.

machineChecks.command: node --test targeted DOCX review preview session builder and command contracts
node --test targeted DOCX review/import preview and review mutate regression pack

agentAudits.verdict: reuse Stage01, review mutate port, and preflight primitives; keep tracked DOCX changes structural diagnostic only
agentAudits.localResolution: addressed by separate DOCX review preview session candidate builder and command activation through handleReviewSurfaceImportPacketCommandSurface

agentAudits.verdict: preflight must remain diagnostic-only; activation must not accept renderer reviewPacket, parsedSurface, applyOps, receipt, recovery, file path, or project context authority
agentAudits.localResolution: addressed by renderer payload allowlist, main-owned context, no-candidate fail closed tests, and forbidden payload tests

nextStep: continue with the separate owner-approved DOCX review local-file entry contour
